title: 3.27.0g Hotfix 2
changes: Damage and speed buffs to Enraged Unique Monsters as part of the Phrecia 2.0 event have been halved.
Lowered the Thaumaturgic Dust cost for Recombinating Idols by 75% and the Gold cost by 50%.
The Refiner's Bargain Unique Idol now has a limit of 1.

The Idol modifier which granted Monsters Imprisoned by Essences a chance to contain a Remnant of Corruption can no longer roll. Pre-existing copies of this modifier will be untouched, as any Remnants of Corruption they would create will instead drop as Vaal orbs.
Random modifiers that replace the types of packs within a Map no longer appear on Unique Maps or areas opened with specific Map Fragments.

Fixed a bug where players in a party could receive rewards from a sky fortress Breach encounter without having participated. You must now be in the instance when the fortress was first encountered to receive rewards.
Fixed a bug where Karui Shores, Mao Kun and The Eye of the Storm were all able to roll random map modifiers which could cause functional problems.
Fixed a bug where the quest versions of the Incarnation Bosses were not dropping their Unique items in the Phrecia event.
Fixed a bug where killing Sirus while Witnessed by the Maven would not count as being completed for the Feared fight.
This patch has been deployed without restarting the servers. You will need to restart your client in order to receive the client changes in this patch.
